about.en: Binance is a centralized cryptocurrency exchange that offers spot, derivatives, and other trading services globally.
about.es: Binance es un exchange de criptomonedas centralizado que ofrece trading spot, derivados y otros servicios a nivel global.
about.ca: Binance és un exchange de criptomonedes centralitzat que ofereix trading spot, derivats i altres serveis a nivell global.
